data.title: Microservices
data.description: Instagram utilizes a microservices architecture to ensure scalability and isolated management of features.
data.technical_spec: Docker and Kubernetes are often used to manage and deploy isolated services.

data.title: Data Infrastructure
data.description: Relies heavily on sharded MySQL databases and Cassandra for data storage and retrieval.
data.technical_spec: MySQL, Cassandra, and Redis are commonly used database technologies.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Uses a CDN to distribute content effectively around the globe.
data.technical_spec: CDNs like Akamai or Cloudflare improve load times by caching content.

data.title: GraphQL API
data.description: Provides a GraphQL API for efficient data queries and to minimize over-fetching.
data.technical_spec: GraphQL framework for flexible and rapid data retrieval.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Ensures high availability and reliability through load balancing techniques.
data.technical_spec: HTTP/S load balancing using NGINX or HAProxy.
